name: Product Carousel
description: A responsive carousel of manually selected products or N catalog-order, daily-random, or request-random products from a category.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Product Carousel
attribute_definition_groups.description: A responsive carousel of manually selected products or N catalog-order, daily-random, or request-random products from a category.

attribute_definitions.name: Heading
attribute_definitions.description: Section heading shown above the products.

attribute_definitions.name: Supporting text
attribute_definitions.description: Optional short line shown below the heading.

attribute_definitions.name: Product source
attribute_definitions.description: Auto uses the selected category when present and otherwise uses manually added product cards.

attribute_definitions.name: Category
attribute_definitions.description: Automatically populate the carousel with products from this category.

attribute_definitions.name: Number of products
attribute_definitions.description: Number of category products shown in the carousel (between 1 and 12).

attribute_definitions.name: Category selection
attribute_definitions.description: Keep catalog order, randomize on every server load, or use a stable selection that changes daily.

attribute_definitions.name: Catalog image type
attribute_definitions.description: Catalog view type used by category-loaded product cards.

attribute_definitions.name: Show badges
attribute_definitions.description: Show product badges such as new or sale on category-loaded cards.

attribute_definitions.name: Show wishlist action
attribute_definitions.description: Show the wishlist action on category-loaded cards.

attribute_definitions.name: Show quick add
attribute_definitions.description: Show the quick-add action on category-loaded cards.

attribute_definitions.name: Show color swatches
attribute_definitions.description: Show color swatches and request swatch imagery for category-loaded products.

attribute_definitions.name: Show brand
attribute_definitions.description: Show the product brand on category-loaded cards.

attribute_definitions.name: Show category
attribute_definitions.description: Show the product category when returned by Product Search.

attribute_definitions.name: Show product name
attribute_definitions.description: Show the product name and PDP link.

attribute_definitions.name: Show SKU
attribute_definitions.description: Show the product identifier.

attribute_definitions.name: Show rating
attribute_definitions.description: Show the rating surface supplied by the host storefront.

attribute_definitions.name: Show price
attribute_definitions.description: Show current and previous prices when available.

attribute_definitions.name: Show promotions
attribute_definitions.description: Show promotional messages associated with the product price.

attribute_definitions.name: Maximum swatches
attribute_definitions.description: Maximum visible color swatches per category-loaded product (between 1 and 12).

attribute_definitions.name: Additional attributes
attribute_definitions.description: Up to 5 custom attributes separated by lines or commas. Use material|Material or season=Season.

attribute_definitions.name: View-all label
attribute_definitions.description: Optional label displayed at the end of the heading row.

attribute_definitions.name: View-all destination
attribute_definitions.description: Internal or external destination for the view-all link.
